note: Codified from the City of Hutto Unified Development Code (UDC), Chapter 4 (Site design standards), Section 10.403.4.2 (Primary and accessory structures default bulk standards) and Section 10.403.3 (Lot dimensions and area) — UDC Updated through March 2024, the current in-force edition hosted as a city PDF at huttotx.gov (NOT on Municode; the batch's 'Municode UDC' label was incorrect — Municode has no Hutto client and Hutto's Code of Ordinances is on eCode360 while the UDC/zoning lives in this standalone city PDF). Each district cites the UDC Section 10.403.4.2 bulk-standards table. MODELING NOTES: (1) Front yard (min), Side yard (min), Rear yard (min), and Building height (max) come from the Section 10.403.4.2 table; the table states building height in FEET so max_height_ft is ordinance-sourced. (2) The UDC states NO per-district maximum building lot-coverage or impervious-cover cap in the bulk-standards table, so max_lot_coverage_pct and max_impervious_pct are not_specified and carry 100 as non-binding stand-ins. (3) The Section 10.403.4.2 table has NO separate corner/street-side yard column, so side_corner_ft is not_specified and mirrors the base side yard. (4) The UDC splits SF-1 into three sub-variants (SF-1, SF-1 zero lot line, SF-1 village) that all normalize to the same leading code 'SF1'; because a parcel's GIS zoningCode carries only 'SF-1' and cannot distinguish sub-variants, only the base SF-1 (conventional) is codified to avoid an unresolvable district-mapping collision. (5) SF-2 side is stated '5 ft.; 0 ft. for common walls'; the conventional 5 ft is codified. (6) B-1/B-2/LI/I side and rear are stated '0 ft. for common walls or 10 ft.; from [residential distances]'; the base 10 ft (non-common-wall) side and the stated 25 ft rear are codified with residential-adjacency exceptions flagged. (7) MH (Manufactured Housing) height is stated '1 story' (not feet) so max_height_ft is not_specified for MH; MH is retained because its setbacks are stated. (8) Hutto has a separate Form Based Code / Old Town (Chapter 10) transect-zone set that is form-based (height in stories, build-to lines) and is EXCLUDED from this conventional-setback table.
